# Partner

> External partner/integrator in the Flusk ecosystem

## Fields

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| id | uuid | yes | auto | Primary key |
| name | string | yes | - | Partner name |
| email | string | yes | - | Contact email |
| website | string | yes | - | Partner website |
| status | pending \| approved \| suspended | yes | pending | Partner status |
| apiKey | string | yes | - | API key for partner access |
| tier | free \| standard \| premium | yes | free | Partner tier |
| organizationId | string | yes | - | Associated organization |
| createdAt | datetime | yes | auto | Creation timestamp |
| updatedAt | datetime | yes | auto | Last update timestamp |

## Relations

- belongsTo **Organization** (via `organizationId`)

## API Endpoints

- `GET /api/partner` — List all
- `POST /api/partner` — Create
- `GET /api/partner/:id` — Get by ID
- `PUT /api/partner/:id` — Update
- `DELETE /api/partner/:id` — Delete
